name: NXIVM
description: A self-help organization that evolved into a sex trafficking and forced labour cult, utilizing blackmail and intense surveillance, led by Keith Raniere.

surveillance_pillars.notes: Members used encrypted communication; collateral (nude photos, confessions) stored digitally.
DOS slaves were required to report on each other; ‘masters’ enforced rules.
Legal threats and NDAs used, but no dedicated intelligence wing like Scientology.
Collateral made members terrified of exposure; they self-policed thoughts.

legal_status.details: Raniere convicted in 2019 for racketeering, sex trafficking, etc.

sources.title: NXIVM leader Keith Raniere found guilty
